Yes 2370 (27.5%)

Yes 987 (11.5%)

Yes 591 (6.9%)

Yes 499 (5.8%)

Yes 719 (8.3%)

Yes 607 (7.0%)

Yes 1427 (16.6%)

Yes 1138 (13.2%)

Yes 3060 (35.2%)

Yes 2313 (26.6%)

160 SVB_PENHIGHM Penetration with penis happened because you were unable to consent, male categorical 8651 (99.4%) No 44 (81.5%)
Yes 10 (18.5%)

Yes 45 (2.2%)

Yes 35 (1.7%)

Yes 31 (1.5%)

Yes 19 (9.6%)
165 SVB_PEN12M Past 12 months, experienced sexual violence (penetration), male categorical 8597 (98.8%) No 97 (89.8%)
Yes 11 (10.2%)

Yes 2234 (25.9%)

Yes 1238 (14.4%)

Yes 581 (6.8%)

Yes 1025 (11.9%)

Yes 901 (10.5%)

Yes 231 (20.3%)

Yes 736 (30.5%)

8 or more years ago 513 (70.0%)

Yes 317 (53.7%)

Yes 169 (27.0%)

Yes 271 (43.4%)

Yes 181 (29.5%)

Yes 105 (16.9%)

Yes 324 (52.7%)

Yes 276 (46.5%)

Selected 264 (60.6%)

Selected 66 (15.1%)

Selected 51 (11.7%)

Selected 35 (8.0%)

Selected 99 (22.7%)
